backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a service ticket platform with user management, ticket CRUD, comments, and optional file attachments using blob storage and migrations.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old ticket records (with a 'category' field) into new ticket records (with 'moduleName' and optional 'attachment' fields) during canister upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three implemented features: replacing the category dropdown with Module Name, updating display components to show moduleName, and adding a file attachment input to the ticket form.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their roles in the ticket platform UI.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including background, foreground, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app at the 'root' div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication state, role-based routing, and page navigation between customer and provider views using a simple state machine.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component with a responsive sidebar that renders role-based navigation (customer vs. service provider) and user info/logout controls.
frontend/src/components/PriorityBadge.ts: Renders a colored badge with an icon for a ticket's priority level (low, medium, high).
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Renders a styled badge displaying a ticket's status (open, in_progress, resolved, closed).
frontend/src/components/SummaryStats.tsx: Displays a grid of four stat cards showing ticket counts grouped by status for a given list of tickets.
frontend/src/components/TicketCard.tsx: Clickable card component that displays a ticket's status, priority, title, description, module, and creation date.
frontend/src/components/TicketFilters.ts: Filter bar with dropdowns for ticket status, priority, and module name, plus a clear-filters button when any filter is active.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: React context providing authentication state (user, login, logout) with session storage persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing identity, login/clear functions, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for users, tickets, and comments, wrapping actor calls with useQuery and useMutation and invalidating relevant caches on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind layers, and defines CSS custom properties for the design system including colors, status/priority tokens, and dark mode variants.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login/registration page with tabbed forms for Customer and Service Provider roles, calling createUser and then storing the session via the auth context.
frontend/src/pages/MyTickets.tsx: Customer-facing page that lists the current user's tickets sorted by date, with loading skeletons, error handling, and a button to navigate to the raise-ticket page.
frontend/src/pages/ProviderDashboard.tsx: Service provider dashboard that displays summary stats and a filterable, sortable list of all tickets fetched via useAllTickets.
frontend/src/pages/RaiseTicket.tsx: Form page for creating a new support ticket with fields for title, description, module, priority, and an optional file attachment with upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/TicketDetail.tsx: React component that displays full details of a single ticket, including status badges, comments list, add-comment form, and status transition buttons for providers. Handles comment submission and status updates via React Query mutation hooks.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme tokens (colors using oklch variables, fonts, border radii, shadows, and keyframe animations) along with plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: JSON file tracking the overall project state, including version, architectural notes, known issues, and a list of existing implemented features with their requirement IDs and descriptions.
